sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n9690" key="a)ntepimetre/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντεπι-μετρέω</orth>, <sense id="n9690.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">measure to in return,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:5:142" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.142</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
